title: Alcohol content, serving size & beer style
lead: Understanding ABV, standard drinks, and what beer styles tell you about flavour expectations.

title: Ingredients & allergens
lead: What's actually in your beer, from core ingredients to common additives and allergen information.

title: Producer & origin
lead: Who actually made your beer and where — understanding producer phrases, contract brewing, and how to find the real brewing location.

title: Marks, logos & certifications
lead: EU quality marks (PGI, PDO, TSG), Trappist and Abbey Beer certifications, independent brewer logos, and competition awards explained.

title: Freshness, dates & traceability
lead: Packaged-on vs best-before dates, batch codes, and how different styles age.

title: Storage, sediment & 'live' beer handling
lead: Proper storage conditions, understanding sediment, and serving bottle-conditioned and cask beers.
